title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Luxury Pack Of 4 Bath Sheets, 100% Egyptian Cotton Towels, 450 GSM Quick Dry Towel, Blue, 80X140
features: STYLISH NEW HAMPTON BATH SHEET: The sumptuous hampton range brings elegance and grace into your bathroom furnishings with its simple block color design in an array of fabulous shades
FANTASTIC ABSORBENT BATHROOM TOWEL: Designed for maximum absorbency, these exquisite Hampton towels are perfect for helping you dry off quickly so you can focus on going about your busy lifestyle
SUPER SOFT AND COSY: Made from super soft material, these fabulous towel set feel luxuriously smooth against your skin and help keep you warm as you dry off

MACHINE WASHABLE LUXURY TOWELS: These super soft towels are crafted from easy care material, these machine washable bathroom linen items are quick and convenient to look after in the comfort of your own home
As we Evolve, our homes should too. To make your home as comfortable as attractive, please visit the Amazon Official GC GAVENO CAVAILIA store.
